patterns.name: DP_ID
patterns.comment: DP ID starting with IN followed by digits

patterns.name: TRADING_ID
patterns.comment: FIX-3: 6-7 digit trading client ID — negative lookaround prevents matching inside longer numbers

patterns.name: PAN
patterns.comment: PAN card number — 5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter

patterns.name: DP_ACCOUNT_CDSL
patterns.comment: FIX-4: 16-digit CDSL DP account — added leading \b to prevent mid-number false matches

patterns.name: BANK_ACC
patterns.comment: FIX-2: Bank account number 9-18 digits — was \b\d{14}\b which missed 11-digit accounts

patterns.name: AADHAR
patterns.comment: FIX-4: 12-digit Aadhaar — added leading \b to prevent mid-number false matches

patterns.name: CIF
patterns.comment: CIF number — supports: CIF 12345678, CIF: 12345678, CIF no. 12345678

patterns.name: CORP_ID
patterns.comment: Corporate ID — supports: CORP ID ABC123, CORP: XYZ001, CORPID AB9988

patterns.name: USER_ID
patterns.comment: User ID — supports: USER ID U12345, UID: 456789, userid uid112233
